author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text:
Today on "Archiving the really important datasets" @hacdias puts @xkcdComic getting replicated daily into #IPFS 

Archive at https://ipfs.io/ipns/xkcd.hacdias.com

Learn how https://hacdias.com/blog/mirrorring-xkcd-ipfs

Well done Sir 👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽 Will enjoy reviewing this collection on my next flight✈️
